This cannot be undone.

Engine patch detected.

You have 'Lone Wolf' mode enabled. Are you SURE you want to launch without backing up?

You have already completed an emergency backup.

Are you sure you want to launch the game?

A Game Patch is Active.

Would you like to run an emergency backup before launching?
defcon_prompt_patch_detected:
A game patch has been detected.

Would you like to run an emergency backup now?
defcon_sealing_desc: A surprise game patch is imminent. Sanctuary OS is currently sealing your vault and executing emergency backups to prevent Artifcat corruption. Do not close the application.
dossier_flag_desc: Select a reason to flag this Artifcat for Architect review.
dossier_no_desc_manifest: No local description provided for this manifest. Architects can update this locally to maintain organizational logs without breaking the global DNA signature.
dossier_no_desc_sub: No specific local description provided for this sub-artifact.
dropzone_awaiting_desc4: archives directly into this zone to ingest them into the secure Vault.

err_module_desc: The module encountered a critical error. The rest of Sanctuary OS remains operational.

feed_flag_success: Content has been flagged for review.
hub_defcon_confirm_execute: Are you absolutely sure you want to broadcast a DEFCON 1 global alert? This will immediately lock down all connected clients and force emergency backups.
hub_defcon_confirm_stand_down: Are you sure you want to stand down the global alert? This will lift the lockdown for all clients.
hub_defcon_override_desc: Initiate a DEFCON 1 protocol. This will instantly force all connected Sanctuary OS clients to seal their vaults and trigger emergency backups. Use only during imminent game patch deployments.

ide_place_files: Place .js, .ts, .json, or .xml files in the Sandbox.

malware_alert_description: Known malware signatures have been detected on your local system. To protect your files and ensure systemic integrity, the OS requires an immediate SECURE SHRED. This action will permanently overwrite the malicious data multiple times, making it unrecoverable by specialized software.

radar_empty_desc: No artifacts were found in your active Mods folder. The Conflict Radar scans your actively deployed loadout. Equip a Blueprint from the Command Center first to test it for clashes!
radar_landing_desc: Deploy the Conflict Radar to scan your active load order for fatal structural clashes, tuning data overlaps, and duplicate asset clones. Neutralize threats before they destabilize your environment.
radar_scanning_desc: Please stand by. Analyzing target blueprint for duplicate assets and logical conflicts.
radar_subtitle: Load-order scans, duplicates, and override conflicts
radar_tier3_desc: XML / SimData overlaps detected. Neutralize via Override.
radar_tier3_desc_winner: Both artifacts can remain active. Choose the winner to safely override the other in the Sanctuary.
radar_tier4_desc: Core Python or Binary overlaps detected. Overrides impossible.
radar_tier4_desc_winner: Only ONE of these artifacts can remain active. Choose the winner to keep in your Blueprint.
